title: Polish TUI height, add confirmation screen, smooth progress output

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--ratatui-tui
comments.content: Plan: Three improvements: (1) Increase inline viewport height from 14 to 20 so previous selections summary is visible. (2) Add a confirmation screen after the last question showing all 4 choices with Enter to confirm / Backspace to go back. (3) Fix output inconsistencies: cpitd subprocess output bleeds into step_start/step_ok pattern, signing 'skipped' shown as step_ok instead of skip style, and overall alignment smoothing.
